items.title: Jade Tempest
items.tagline: Official Anichin pilot feed for the first repo-tn wave
items.overview: A martial storm tears through floating provinces while TetoNova exercises its first official repo-hosted compat anime lane.
items.sourceNote: Official TetoNova pilot source seeded from the repo-tn channel and aligned to anichin.moe.

items.title: Astral Lantern
items.tagline: Weekly fantasy mystery for the repo-tn launch shelf
items.overview: A courier carrying a forbidden lantern crosses fractured realms, giving TetoNova a serialized title for search, detail, and resume testing.

items.title: Iron Petal OVA
items.tagline: Compact one-shot used for first-party compat playback checks
items.overview: A short experimental OVA used to validate how an official repo-hosted compat source behaves across detail, quick play, and fallback flows.
